case_title: CHRISTOPHER MULANAX VS. REGUS SAN FRANCISCO SOUTH FINANCIAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-09-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER MULANAX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REGUS MANAGEMENT GROUP LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR IF THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE APR-2021 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
